'''Desric Fol''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Scout/Legends|Scout]]<ref name="PoG3" /> who owned and operated the [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] ''[[Blind Luck]]'' during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|284|Fol, Desric}}</ref>
